name: TransferGo International Remittance API
what_it_does: TransferGo international remittance REST API for businesses and financial institutions to integrate cross-border money transfer services optimized for Eastern European, Baltic, and diaspora corridors covering 60+ countries with bank transfer delivery and competitive FX rates for migrant worker and diaspora payment flows. Enables AI agents to manage transfer initiation for cross-border remittance automation, handle recipient bank account management for international transfer workflow automation, access FX rate quote for real-time exchange rate display automation, retrieve transfer status tracking for remittance delivery automation, manage sender verification for AML compliance automation, handle delivery speed selection for express vs standard transfer automation, access corridor availability for supported country-pair automation, retrieve fee calculation for transfer cost transparency automation, manage transfer cancellation for remittance reversal automation, and integrate TransferGo with diaspora banking, neobank, and payroll platforms for end-to-end Eastern European remittance automation.
use_cases: Sending remittances to Eastern Europe from diaspora payment agents
Processing Baltic corridor transfers from migrant worker payroll agents
Checking FX rates for PLN, UAH, RON corridors from transfer agents
Tracking international transfer delivery from remittance workflow agents
not_for: B2B commercial payments (TransferGo is consumer remittance focused)
Global enterprise FX treasury (use Airwallex or Wise Business for enterprise)
Non-Eastern Europe/Baltic corridors (TransferGo has strongest coverage in these)
best_when: A financial institution or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate international remittance for Eastern European and Baltic corridors (Poland, Ukraine, Romania, Lithuania) through TransferGo's diaspora-optimized transfer network.
avoid_when: PARTNER API IS NOT CONSUMER API: TransferGo partner/business API requires separate agreement from consumer app; automated B2C integration requires business partnership; automated consumer credentials for API access creates unauthorized access. UKRAINE CORRIDOR DISRUPTION: TransferGo Ukraine corridor (UAH) may have service disruptions due to geopolitical conditions; automated Ukraine transfer must handle real-time corridor availability check; automated assumption of UAH corridor availability creates unexpected transfer rejection. FX RATE QUOTE EXPIRES: TransferGo FX rate quote expires within seconds to minutes; automated transfer must use rate within validity window; automated delayed transfer after quote creates rate_expired error and new rate may be worse. TRANSFER CANCELLATION WINDOW IS SHORT: TransferGo transfer cancellation is only possible before bank processing begins; automated cancellation must occur within minutes of creation; automated cancellation of in-progress transfer creates cannot_cancel_in_progress error.

auth.notes: TransferGo uses OAuth 2.0 for business/partner API. REST API with JSON. Vilnius, Lithuania / London, UK HQ. Founded 2012 by Daumantas Dvilinskas. Backed by Hard Yaka, Rubio Impact Ventures, OTB Ventures ($100M+ raised). Products: Consumer remittance app, Business API, Multi-currency accounts. No public SDK. FCA-regulated. EMI licensed. Focus: Poland, Ukraine, Romania, Baltic corridors. 5M+ customers. Competes with Wise and Remitly.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Business API requires partnership; consumer app promotional first-transfer offers
pricing.paid_tiers: Business API pricing negotiated; consumer: fee from $0 (Economy) + FX spread; Express delivery at premium
pricing.notes: Vilnius LT / London UK. FCA regulated. Business API pricing negotiated. Consumer per-transfer pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; transfer and quote APIs throttled; webhooks for transfer status events

known_agent_gotchas: RATE QUOTE HAS SHORT VALIDITY WINDOW: TransferGo FX quote is valid for a short window (typically 30-60 seconds); automated transfer creation must use quoteId immediately; automated delayed transfer creation after quote creates rate_expired and recalculated (potentially worse) rate

UKRAINE UAH CORRIDOR AVAILABILITY VARIABLE: TransferGo Ukraine (UAH) corridor may have temporary or extended service interruptions; automated transfer must check corridor availability before initiating UAH transfer; automated assumption of UAH availability creates unexpected corridor_unavailable error

ECONOMY vs EXPRESS DELIVERY SPEED: TransferGo offers Economy (free, next day) and Express (paid, hours) delivery; automated transfer must select appropriate speed tier; automated defaulting to Economy for time-sensitive transfers creates SLA miss for urgent remittances

KYC REQUIRED BEFORE TRANSFER: TransferGo requires sender KYC verification (ID document + selfie) before transfers above threshold; automated transfer for unverified sender creates kyc_required block; automated transfer pipeline must check verification status

RECIPIENT ACCOUNT VALIDATION VARIES BY COUNTRY: TransferGo recipient IBAN/account number validation rules differ by destination country; automated recipient creation must use country-specific account format; automated universal IBAN assumption creates invalid_account for non-SEPA destinations
agent_readiness.security_notes: EU/Baltic remittance. FCA, EMI licensed. OAuth2. EU/UK. Financial transfer and identity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Remittance. FCA, EMI. OAuth2. EU/UK. Financial transfer and identity data.
